description: Pipeline status poll endpoint contract. Returns plain-text responses — not JSON envelopes.
note: Consumers (scripts, orchestrators) depend on the exact string values 'idle' and 'running'.

responses.description: No pipeline run is in progress
responses.guardsAgainst: Changing the idle response string away from the exact token depended on by pollers and shell scripts.

responses.description: Pipeline run is currently in progress (AtomicBoolean guard is true)
responses.guardsAgainst: Changing the running response string away from the exact token depended on by pollers and shell scripts.
